parameters.query: SELECT value FROM pipemind.system_state WHERE key = 'roster_valid';

parameters.errorMessage: F-05: Roster is not valid (SC-19). Run Workflow 00 (Startup / Config Validation) first.

parameters.query: SELECT r.discord_id, r.name, r.clockify_user_id, r.calendar_email, COALESCE((SELECT TRUE FROM pipemind.standup_records sr WHERE sr.discord_id = r.discord_id AND sr.standup_date = CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1), FALSE) AS heard_from_today, COALESCE((SELECT TRUE FROM pipemind.outreach_log ol WHERE ol.discord_id = r.discord_id AND ol.outreach_type = 'check_in' AND ol.outreach_date = CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1), FALSE) AS already_contacted FROM pipemind.roster r WHERE r.active = TRUE AND r.role = 'developer' AND r.muted = FALSE ORDER BY r.name;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timeMin: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + 'T00:00:00Z', timeMax: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + 'T23:59:59Z', items: $('Aggregate & Guard Empty').first().json.developers.filter(d => d.calendar_email).slice(0, 50).map(d => ({ id: d.calendar_email })) }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pipemind.system_state (key, value) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value;

parameters.body: ={"content": "[Pipemind] Check-in skipped today: both Clockify and Google Calendar were unavailable. No developers were contacted (SC-18 fail-safe). Please verify the integrations are running."}

={"content": "[Pipemind] We have not received a standup update from you today. No pressure at all - just checking in to see if there is anything you need or any blockers we can help with. Feel free to reply here anytime."}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pipemind.outreach_log (discord_id, outreach_type, outreach_date) VALUES ($1, 'check_in', CURRENT_DATE) ON CONFLICT (discord_id, outreach_type, outreach_date) DO NOTHING;
